overview: An interactive 3D map application centered on Frankfurt with global search and turn-by-turn route planning (driving, cycling, walking) powered by OpenStreetMap and OpenRouteService.
features: Global search for cities and addresses (Nominatim)
Turn-by-turn route planning for car, bike and on foot
Route drawing on the map with distance and travel time
Location markers with smooth camera fly-to
Saved search history and favorite places
